ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the lead */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the lead */,
  "phone_no" TEXT /* Phone number of the lead */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the lead belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the lead (e.g., New Lead, Follow Up, Lost) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action required for the lead (e.g., Follow Up, Meeting) */,
  "lead_source" TEXT /* Source of the lead (e.g., social media, email, phone, referral) */,
  "lead_score" INTEGER /* Lead score, calculated based on engagement and interactions */,
  "crm_system_id" TEXT /* CRM system ID for seamless data exchange and synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_company FOREIGN KEY ("company") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone_no" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead being assigned */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative the lead is assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the lead was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lead_assignments_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lead_assignments_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES leads ("lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead being interacted with */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative interacting with the lead */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., Email, Phone Call, Meeting) */,
  "interaction_medium" TEXT /* Medium of interaction (e.g., social media, phone, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES leads ("lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction detail */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction being described */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_details_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pipelines" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipeline */,
  "pipeline_name" TEXT /* Name of the pipeline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pipeline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pipeline_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipeline the stage belongs to */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipeline_stages_pipeline_id FOREIGN KEY ("pipeline_id") REFERENCES pipelines ("pipeline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representative_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the sales representative */,
  "sales_velocity" REAL /* Sales velocity of the sales representative */,
  "lead_response_time" INTEGER /* Average lead response time of the sales representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_representative_performance_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_up_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead being reminded */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative being reminded */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date of the reminder */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time of the reminder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_up_reminders_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES leads ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_up_reminders_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "analytic_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analytic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id")
)
